And basically what that means is we say we are here to help you, help give you all the building blocks, building blocks that you need to power the fastest, most accurate, most relevant search that you can then consume through your agents and your apps.

So we are here to give you all the building blocks, the picks and shovels, the infrastructure that makes this all, you know, sort of so seamless for you that you can deliver amazing, outstanding experiences when you build apps.

API access, and that could be SDK, you know, MCP, whatever, down the line.

So if you take that lens that we are creating this AI search infrastructure, there are basically two sort of audiences that we are trying to target.

And in order of priority, it is one, the developer community or people who are heads of development, head VP of product engineering, people who are looking at what is the best API out there, what is the best SDK out there, what are the best websites, and how to integrate that.
So there's the build with us type of a community is what we are calling it.
are the builders, come to us.

And so, in order of priorities, they're going out of the dev, and then the second is that second audience.

## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off partnership between You.com and GrowthX to increase developer awareness and API adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [You.com is pivoting to focus on AI search infrastructure and API-first approach for developers](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
  - [Current challenges: low brand awareness, limited presence in developer conversations](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Key differentiators: vertical domain indexes, composable API, fresh news index](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Need to develop benchmarks, use cases, and content strategy to compete with established players](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)

## Topics

### You.com's Strategic Shift

  - [Transitioning from consumer brand to enterprise/developer focus](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Redefining category as "AI search infrastructure" with two key components:](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=918.0)
    1.  API access (SDK, MCP)
    2.  Vertical domain indexes (narrow, deep information)
  - [Primary target: Developer community (VP Engineering, Product)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
  - [Secondary: CIO community (less technical, need end-to-end solutions)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Main competitors: Anthropic, Perplexity, traditional SERP API providers](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2826.0)
  - [Differentiators:](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Composable API (flexibility for developers)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
      - [Fresh news index](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
      - [Vertical domain indexes (e.g., hospitality, legal, retail)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [Commoditization of basic search API](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2883.0)
      - [Need for clear differentiation in accuracy, latency, freshness, or cost](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)

### Customer Acquisition Strategy

  - [Trigger events:](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2282.0)
      - [Bing shutting down their service](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2308.0)
      - [Competitors reducing API call limits](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
      - [Need for breaking news capability](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Evaluation process critical:](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
      - [Human preference benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3277.0)
      - [Custom evaluation sets](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3492.0)
      - [Open vs. closed evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3410.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Developing use case-specific content (e.g., retail deep dive)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)
  - [Creating guides on when/where to use You.com APIs](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3616.0)
  - [Focusing on SEO/AEO for basic terms to build authority](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3646.0)
  - [Leveraging multiple content pieces to dominate AI-generated answers](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3712.0)
  - [Exploring paid newsletters and gated content for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3915.0)

### Collaboration with GrowthX

  - [8-week strategy sprint to align direction, strategy, and quality definition](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)
  - [Deep dives planned with various team members](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide "What We Heard" document and follow-up actions](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule deep dives with key team members (product, marketing, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)
  - [Share internal documents, presentations, and unpublished research with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3859.0)
  - [Develop content pipeline for gated newsletters and educational materials](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3915.0)
  - [Explore human preference benchmarks and custom evaluation processes](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3277.0)
  - [Collaborate on use case-specific content and SEO/AEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/RAJDL1oEotVDvE4FqsrYe-N5PSq6xAfk?tab=summary&timestamp=3541.0)

action_items.description: Schedule chat with Marcel from GrowthX to discuss API differentiation strategies and benchmarking
Share keyword gap analysis and competitor breakdown with GrowthX team
Send meeting recording and summary of what was heard to You.com team
Identify and introduce additional You.com team members for deep dives with GrowthX, esp. on product side
Provide GrowthX access to any non-public docs, presentations, or research about You.com's API and products
Set up deep dive with GrowthX to discuss newsletter strategies, paid newsletters, and games for driving MQLs
Share info on engineers who write blogs frequently with GrowthX team
